hotel_name: Khách sạn New Palace (New Palace Bac Lieu Hotel)

reviews.title: 7km hotel taxi cost is 300,000 dong
reviews.text: Worst hotel taxi with a total garbage rate. I took a hotel taxi to the restaurant 7km away and it cost for 300,000 VND(fck). When I returned, the redtuarant taxi price was just 100,000 VND. I've been in a hotel that takes guests as idiots so openly. They see customers who can't speak Vietnamese as fools. Because of such a hotel, the image of bac lieu is ruined and foreigners are insulting Vietnam. Don't you know that such a thing is detrimental to Vietnam? I spoke to the reception staff in English about this issue, but they didn't care. I was so angry that when I left the hotel, I just packed my bags and walked for 30 minutes.i ve never came back this worst service hotel

reviews.title: Who gave this 5 stars?
reviews.text: A long long way from what you would call a 5 star hotel. No frills, no special service, bland decor. Staff were more interested in sitting on the sofas in the lobby texting or surfing on their phones than attending to a guest. How this place got a 5 star rating I'll never know. I think the owner/manager needs to go to a real luxury hotel to see how things should be done to warrant such a rating.

reviews.title: Not impressed,
reviews.text: From picture and building is look nice,include surrounding also, but the lean of room and food is poor, I can not sleep well due to small ant on the bed do not know where is it come from, I got hurt from them

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: The hotel is smelly and breakfast does not have many foods as expected and too expensive so it's not worth it for money. This hotel should not classified as 5 stars standard hotel.

Not clean. Toilet not good.

reviews.room_type: Deluxe Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: No credit cards is accepted; it is so inconvenient!!!

reviews.title: 5 star??
reviews.text: I know this hotel hasn't been open long so I'll try not to be too scathing. I've stayed in a few 5 star hotels in Vietnam  thanks to the great offers and rewards on Agoda and never been disappointed until now. When you think 5 star you expect a certain level of luxury, facilities, food and service. This place was lacking on all counts. The hotel itself looked fantastic and the room was very nice as you'd expect but it was soulless and bland with nothing to make you think you were in a luxury hotel. The pool area for instance was a white featureless space with a pool in the middle an half a dozen loungers. There was no greenery or ornaments or anything, it was uninspiring and univiting. The facilities were non existent. There was no safe in the room, no toweling robes in fact none of the little things that make a 5 star stay memorable. The staff although polite were often seen on their mobile phones sitting on the sofas in the lobby and on occasion had to be interrupted from texting to pay attention and offer service. This for me was unacceptable and clearly there is a management issue here. As for the food? Well don't expect high end cuisine you normally find in such places. It was basic Vietnamese fare with very little choice, the menu which was in one of those little plastic holders that sit on a table had about 10 simple Vietnamese dishes one could find outside for a lot less and of better quality. One morning I came down for breakfast and there wasn't any. I was offered A la carte but then they couldn't even provide what I ordered. We had to go out of the hotel for every meal basically. I couldn't even get a glass of orange juice. Bac Lieu isn't a big tourist destination and that's reflected in the limited choice of hotels in the town but all of the others we've stayed in have been better for one reason or another, be it location or service or dining. Would I stay here again? Well yes I would but only to see if it had upped its game and started to live up to the

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
I am writing this response regarding the issue related to my booking at New Palace Hotel Bac Lieu.

I made a total of 4 room reservations through Agoda, including:

* 2 bookings, each for 1 Deluxe room with lake view
* 1 booking for 2 Standard rooms

However, upon arrival for check-in, the hotel receptionist informed me that they only received:

* 1 booking for a Standard room from Agoda
* 2 bookings for Deluxe rooms from Traveloka (not from Agoda)
* And the Deluxe rooms they received were of the type that does not have a lake view (no view)

Although I provided full confirmation of my booking from Agoda clearly indicating the type of room booked (Deluxe with lake view) and paid a higher price for this type of room, the hotel still only arranged for me a Deluxe room without a view, with the reason that they only received such confirmation from the system.

This incident directly affects my rights as a customer. I request Agoda to clarify why my booking information was not accurately transmitted to the hotel, and to take appropriate measures to ensure my legitimate rights are upheld.

I hope Agoda will respond soon and provide a clear and transparent solution to this situation.

reviews.title: Nice hotel with good scenery of river
reviews.text: The hotel is beside a river which have a nice scenery. The hotel need to improve in training their staff to serve guest.

reviews.title: Dishonest: Incorrect room delivery
reviews.text: On Agoda, it is listed as a lake view room, but the staff did not provide it to the customer and asked the customer to pay extra or cancel Agoda to order directly.

reviews.title: Good Hotel!
reviews.text: From general view, this is a good hotel in Bac Lieu, I don't think we can find the other is better than that. But I don't like the reception here, we checked in this hotel at 10:30pm but the lounge was closed and the reception staff was sleeping. Breakfast is not good, not so many courses. The room is good and clean swimming pool.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Hotel is clean and well kept.  Hot water is a problem, they have no water heater at this property.

reviews.title: Nice hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is situated beside a river which have a nice scenary. The hotel need to improve in training their staff to serve guest.

reviews.title: Accommodations that preserve the flow of time
reviews.text: I chose this place because it is one of the two accommodations that has a swimming pool. The furniture and entrance door are old. It's natural for an old place to show signs of time, but the problem was the smell throughout the hotel. With a little ventilation and the use of diffusers, the hotel's satisfaction rating could be upgraded by a star. P.S. The unpleasant smell in the hotel seems to come from the sewage in the bathroom. Also, having one large bed instead of two small beds in the room would attract more customers.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Room 5 stars VIP: Weak water, no hot water kettle, yellowish towels.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: No hot water......to take  a shower in the morning or evening the water was cold. I complained to staff at reception about this and they just shrugged and said the hot water was run by solar power and because no sun , no hot water!!! The restaurant menu, everything you ordered they did not have , so you had to ask what food do you have?? Staff very unhelpful and no care for the customer.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: The hotel is new and clean. However, facilities are not 5 stars, just 3 stars only. My room is very big, but WC is too small and furniture quality is very cheap, not match 5 stars standard.

reviews.title: Ổn trong tầm giá
reviews.text:
Phòng rộng rãi, có khuôn viên để xe, nằm ở khu yên tĩnh, có hồ bơi, nhân viên thân thiện.
Nhược điểm: không xứng là 5 sao như khách sạn đưa ra trên Agoda. Chỉ tầm 3 sao. Hồ bơi chỉ cho người lớn, không có hồ bơi trẻ em. Ăn sáng không buffet, chỉ gọi món. Cách trung tâm 3km, bình trà rửa chưa được sạch (còn bã).

reviews.title: good
reviews.text: pretty good to stay. 5 stars i’m not sure about it.

reviews.title: Plumbing problems and no safe box
reviews.text:
My room had toilet plugged  up from the first minute we walked in to the room in late evening and we had to deal with it overnight. The staff said she had to pump that toilet every time new guest check in. We requested to change to other room but she pumped it clear. 
We prefer the hotel with a safe box when we travel for our passport and value items but New Palace don’t have one. Otherwise it’s good location and large room.

reviews.title: Very bad! The car window is scratched.
reviews.text: The car was parked in the correct spot, in the designated area. But when I came down in the morning, the car's window had been slashed to pieces. When I reported it to the receptionist, they were silent.

reviews.title: Accompanied by children
reviews.text: The only hotel in Pak Liou that has a swimming pool.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is rundown, there are very few options for breakfast, when I arrived the reception area had no air conditioning and was very hot, the towels in the room were discolored, and the pillowcase was stained and not clean.

reviews.title: Hygiene
reviews.text: The hotel should change the towels, and the room should have a deodorizer box.

reviews.title: Breakfast service and swimming pool
reviews.text:
Is Park Ryu the only place with breakfast provided and a swimming pool?
It's an old place, but the condition isn't bad.
Especially, it was nice that there was no sound from the air conditioner.

The disappointing thing is that the location is on the outskirts, and there are no restaurants or supermarkets nearby.

reviews.title: Family with young children
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Nice swimmimg pool
reviews.text:
Afew years ago when i first visited Bac Lieu, New Palace Hotel is the only hotel with a swimming pool.

Now, there are many new hotels with swimming pools, but all of them just for looks and not good for swimming.

The pool here is the only one that is big and suitable for actual swimming.

reviews.title: Nice place to stay
reviews.text:
Clean room, good wifi and helpful staffs. Brakfast choice was plenty, room was spacious and not too many travelers at the time of our stay. There was an outside pool but the depth was high and not recommended for children. Hotel has no vest for hire. 
Will recommend to others when looking fof a hotel in Bac Lieu area.

reviews.title: Nice Hotel for the price
reviews.text:
Hotel is clean And Nice , price is very competitive compare with other hotel nearby.
We had had to pay for VIP suite which cost almost triple the other room we booked because only VIP room has king size bed. 
Breakfast was good!

reviews.title: A hotel with good cost performance.
reviews.text: Overall, it was a large hotel with good rooms. However, it was a strange hotel where the water pressure was good, but only hot water came out when showering, and there was no cold water.

reviews.title: The hotel looks new.
reviews.text: The hotel looks new, the rooms are spacious but the furnishings and amenities in the room are not very convenient. There are no white light lamps, and the trash can has to be opened by hand, not a foot pedal...

reviews.title: Clean hotel
reviews.text: Quiet location, spacious room, basic room amenities, soundproofing is slightly poor due to the old wooden door system. Friendly and enthusiastic staff, basic buffet breakfast.

reviews.text:
This is a great area facing South Lake, nice manicure beach lake. You can view sunrise in the morning.
Less amenities like restaurant or luxury services. 
Cleaned room, a bit noisy if upstairs pound the floor…Older types of bathroom…Still, we enjoyed so much because of location and friendly service

reviews.text: Minimal traffic noise, good for outdoor photography. Mosquito are rampant after dark by the lake, you need insect repellants to sit at the cafe outside the hotel.

reviews.text: Clean and comfy room, nice place to stay

reviews.title: Sans doute le plus bel hôtel de Bac Lieu
reviews.text: Un charmant hôtel avec une très belle piscine installé face à l'étang de Bac Lieu. Il y a moyen de bien se restaurer dans les environs et le petit-déjeuner est très correct. Avec un petit effort sur la décoration intérieure et aussi sur la propreté des salles de bain (beaucoup d'insectes), je pense que le rapport qualité-prix pourrait être encore plus excellent.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Charmant hôtel situé devant un petit lac dans un quartier certes un peu décentré, mais au calme. Chambre agréable et très propre, lits très fermes et super confortables. Personnel attentif et très efficace et toujours avec le sourire. Excellent petit déjeuner, mais seulement à partir de 6h30. Les réceptionnistes sont toujours à l’écoute, affables et promptes à vous aider quelle que soit votre demande.
Dans l’ensemble, excellente expérience qui m’a fait regretter de le quitter au terme de mes quatre nuitées.

reviews.title: Palace
reviews.text: Ein riesiges Hotel mit sehr wenig gestern. Die Lage ist gut Parkplatz direkt vor dem Hotel. Der Swimmingpool ist riesig aber es gibt keine Liegestühle oder Handtücher oder sonst irgendwas. Sporttraum gibt es auch keinen. Restaurant war abends geschlossen. Wahrscheinlich weil keine Gäste. Aber alle waren höflich und alle waren nett. Und das Geld kann man nicht mehr erwarten.

reviews.title: Das beste Preis-Leistungsverhältnis
reviews.text: Wenn man in einer Gegend unterwegs ist, wo es nicht von europäischen Touristen wimmelt, muss man sich natürlich schon im klaren sein, dass die Hotels etwas anders sind. ;-)  Die Sauberkeit darf man nicht mit unseren Maßstäben messen. Wir waren 7 Tage im New Palace. Für den Preis haben wir das Beste bekommen: Das Personal hat sich sehr bemüht; wir konnten jederzeit was zu essen/trinken bestellen. Wir haben uns für ein Zimmer mit Balkon (Poolblick) entschieden. Die Balkone haben allerdings keine Stühle und keinen Tisch.  Von oben (5.Stock)  hat man in alle Richtungen eine gute Aussicht.  Das Essen in Buffetform war auch sehr gut; allerdings nicht europäisch. Die Außenanlagen vom Hotel sind sehr sauber und gepflegt.  Wir haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt.

reviews.title: Zum Entspannen
reviews.text: Ruhige Lage, Personal sehr freundlich, wenn man dem Trubel entgehen möchte super Ort.

두번 다시 가고싶지 않은 호텔입니다.

reviews.title: Không xứng đáng quảng cáo 5 sao
reviews.text:
Vị trí khu vực vắng vẻ, dịch vụ tiện nghi chưa xứng đáng như quảng cáo 5sao: 
1. Ko có phòng Gym, chỉ có và xe đạp hồ bơi nhưng hỏng ko sử duy đc.
2. Tiện nghi phòng và thiết bị vệ sinh ko sang trọng (bồn tắm của những nhà nghỉ).
3. Buffet ít món, phòng nhỏ sắp xếp ko khoa học, đi lại vướng víu.
4. Nhân viên chưa chuyên nghiệp đẳng của 5sao: khách đến quầy, đang nghe điện thoại, cũng nên nhìn chào khách và nói 1 câu khách đợi . 
Tóm lại, thất vọng hoàn toàn so với tiêu chí 5 sao, so với 4sao Dragon Sea hotel ở Sầm Sơn mới đi về còn thua xa.

reviews.title: Nên đặt phòng trực tiếp với khách sạn
reviews.text: Đây có lẽ là khách sạn tốt nhất ở Bạc Liêu. Bạn sẽ có nhiều lựa chọn phòng và giá phòng rẻ hơn nếu đặt trực tiếp ở khách sạn hoặc bạn nên hỏi giá trước khi đặt phòng. Vì tôi đã tin tưởng Agoda luôn rẻ nhất và không tham khảo giá của k/s trước khi đặt nên giá phòng tôi đặt trên Agoda cao hơn bảng giá ở k/s khoảng 300.000₫/ đêm/ phòng. Tôi đặt 2 đêm, 2 phòng dịp tết và tính ra đắt hơn đặt trực tiếp là 1,2 triệu đồng. Nói chung khi đến các tỉnh miền Tây hoặc các tỉnh không phải là trung tâm du lịch nổi tiếng thì phòng rất sẵn hoặc có thể liên  lạc với k/s hỏi giá trước, hỏi loại phòng và so sánh với các trang đặt phòng trực tuyến trước khi đặt. Đừng tin tưởng các trang này luôn có giá tốt, vì nó chỉ có giá tốt với những nơi đông du khách, ngày lễ tết hoặc k/s có tên tuổi... Tốt nhất nên cẩn thận tham khảo giá thật kỹ và nếu đặt 2 phòng trở lên thì nên đặt 1 phòng trước và đặt tiếp phòng khác sau vài ngày thì giá sẽ giảm hơn. Nói chung đặt phòng cũng cần có kinh nghiệm mới được giá tốt.

reviews.title: Mình cho rằng khách sạn đạt 3,5 sao
reviews.text:
Thời điểm hiện tại do dịch covid nên khách sạn không được chăm chút cho lắm + giá khá thấp nên không thể đòi hỏi nhiều ở dịch vụ. 
Tuy nhiên mình thích phòng 2 giường của các bạn. Phù hợp với nhu cầu cá nhân gia đình mình
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

reviews.title: Sẽ quay lại ^^
reviews.text:
Khách sạn sạch sẽ, đẹp, phòng rộng rãi. 
Nhân viên vui vẻ thân thiệt giúp hành khách.
Ăn sáng ngon, chưa có nhiều món nhưng nói chung là ok.
reviews.room_type: Deluxe Queen Room with Two Queen Beds

reviews.title: Khách sạn mới, đẹp, nhân viên nhiệt tình hiệu quả, sẽ trở lại.
reviews.text: Khách sạn mới xây, đẹp, khuôn viên rộng rãi, thoáng mát. Nhân viên nhiệt tình, thân thiện và hiệu quả. Tuy nhiên vị trí ở khu mới nên hơi xa trung tâm. Không đủ chuẩn 5 sao, phần ăn sáng kém nhưng giá quá hợp lý cho chất lượng mang lại. Sẽ trở lại nếu có dịp về Bạc Liêu lần nữa.

reviews.title: Ta med puter hvis du vil sove godt
reviews.text: Alt bra med dette hotellet bortsett fra de meget ubehagelige soveputer, fikk ikke sove og hadde vondt i nakken dagen etter.

reviews.title: KS rat ok o Bac Lieu
reviews.text: SK OK naht trong cac KS o Bac Lieu . View dep . DV tot . Thx KS va Agoda!

reviews.title: 整體性價比是不高的
reviews.text:
熱水嚴重不足，英文無法溝通，早餐整潔度不夠，隔音很差，當人多的時候 噪音吵雜!
整體來說以五星級的標準是不OK的!但附近有湖 蠻漂亮的!但以這樣我下次會想選擇別間試試

reviews.title: 家族旅遊
reviews.text: 以價格及當地位置而言，十足十的滿意。早餐很豐富。面湖景很優。
